caption:
He didn’t get me flowers or chocolate…

He gifted me an experience I’ll never forget.

This is @giftmemento.ae - a new way to gift in the UAE ✨

transcription.text: Hot summer days, rock and roll The way you play for me at your show And all the ways I got to know Your pretty face and electric soul
